name: Loanmax Title Loans
description_short: LoanMax Title Loans provides fast cash loans secured by vehicle titles, with loans up to $10,000 and same-day or next-day funding available at multiple Nevada locations.
description_long:
LoanMax Title Loans was founded in 1990 in Jonesboro, Georgia, and has operated for over 25 years as a national title loan provider. The company specializes in auto title loans, allowing customers to borrow against the equity in their vehicles without a credit check. They operate multiple locations across Nevada and other states, with the Las Vegas location at 3276 N. Las Vegas Blvd serving the greater Las Vegas area.

The company offers cash loans of up to $10,000 based on vehicle evaluation and ability to repay. The application process requires only a vehicle, photo ID, and a clear vehicle title. LoanMax accepts multiple payment methods including cash, check, debit card, and Western Union. They maintain standard business hours (Mon-Fri 10 AM-6 PM, Sat 9 AM-2 PM at most locations) and provide online account management, payment options, and a toll-free application line (877-511-CASH).

LoanMax distinguishes itself through its established 25+ year track record and multi-state licensing across Nevada, Virginia, Delaware, South Carolina, New Mexico, and Michigan. The company provides transparent regulatory compliance information and customer protection disclosures specific to each state. They maintain a network of multiple locations within Las Vegas alone, offering convenience and accessibility to customers in the region.

As a title loan lender, LoanMax serves customers in urgent financial need, though Nevada's own disclosure warns that title loans should be used for short-term needs only, not long-term solutions. Customers should be aware that title loans typically carry high interest rates and carry risk of vehicle loss if payments are not made. The company is regulated by state financial authorities and provides complaint resolution procedures.
pros: Loans up to $10,000 available with quick approval based on vehicle equity
No credit check required — qualification based on vehicle value and ability to repay
Multiple payment methods accepted: cash, check, debit card, Western Union
Online account management and payment options available
25+ year operating history as established national lender
Multiple Las Vegas locations for customer convenience
Licensed and regulated across multiple states with transparent compliance disclosures
cons: Title loans typically carry high interest rates, though specific APR not disclosed on website
Risk of vehicle repossession if loan payments are not made
Nevada law explicitly warns title loans should only be short-term solutions, not long-term
Company recommends credit counseling for customers with credit difficulties before applying
Loan approval is subject to vehicle evaluation and ability to repay — not guaranteed
best_for: Customers with vehicles and urgent short-term cash needs who cannot access traditional credit
Individuals who need fast funding (same-day or next-day) and have vehicle equity
Borrowers with poor credit history who cannot qualify for personal loans or credit cards
diagnosis: LoanMax Title Loans is best for Nevada residents facing urgent cash shortages who own a vehicle with clear title and cannot access traditional credit. Critical caveat: title loans carry substantial risk of vehicle loss and typically high interest rates; Nevada law and the company itself warn these should only be short-term solutions, and customers with credit issues should seek counseling first.
services: Car title loan applications online and in-store
In-store payments at multiple Nevada locations
Payment method options: cash, check, debit card, Western Union
Vehicle evaluation for loan amount determination
Customer support and directions to physical locations
